'''Lucos Dannt''' was originally a headmaster at the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Royal House of Learning/Legends|Royal House of Learning]].

==Biography==
However, with the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]<ref name="Theed Adventure Game" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> he became a leader of a resistance group referred to as the [[Naboo Underground]]. He was well-informed about the development of the situation and had many contacts, including members of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. This made him a good at designing missions for his agents, which included liberation of prisoners and theft of weapons among other things.<ref name="Theed Adventure Game" />

{{Char-stub}}
